title: Device Settings - Setting change propagation
scenario: Device settings changes made in Poly Studio Mobile app are not propagated to other connected devices (e.g., Poly Lens mobile/desktop app)
steps: 1. Pair and connect the headset to Phone A via Bluetooth.
2. Pair the same headset to Phone B (or desktop) via Bluetooth.
3. On Phone A, open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Tap the device name or "..." button to navigate to Device Settings.
5. Change a setting value (e.g., ANC mode, Transparency Mode, Equalizer preset, or Audio Settings feature).
6. On Phone B (or desktop), open the Poly Lens mobile/desktop app.
7. Navigate to the same device's settings page.
8. Observe whether the setting change made on Phone A is reflected in the Poly Lens app on Phone B.
9. Repeat steps 5–8 for each available setting (ANC, Transparency, Equalizer, Audio Settings, Notifications, etc.).
expected: All setting changes made in the Poly Studio Mobile app on Phone A are propagated and visible in the Poly Lens app on the other connected device (Phone B or desktop).
